description: Authenticated code, model documentation, derived result data and checksums supporting the revised manuscript. The compact packet reproduces publication tables from curated derived inputs; a companion archive contains the twelve author-generated annual hourly BEM Parquet bundles. The deposit uses mixed, file-level licensing documented in LICENSING.md and LICENSE_MATRIX.tsv.
notes: The deposit does not redistribute raw thermal-comfort observations, the prepared TSV fitting table, UN WPP source records, CMIP6 source files or derived EPWs. See THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.md.
title: Result-reproduction materials for Equal cooling setpoints, unequal thermal outcomes
